[User] You are the planner actor for a deterministic Pluto runtime phase.
Return exactly one fenced ```json block and nothing else.
The directive kind must be `create_task` and the payload must match exactly.
```json
{
  "kind": "create_task",
  "payload": {
    "title": "Implement the requested runtime change",
    "ownerActor": {
      "kind": "role",
      "role": "generator"
    },
    "dependsOn": []
  }
}
```
```json
{
  "kind": "create_task",
  "payload": {
    "title": "Implement the requested runtime change",
    "ownerActor": {
      "kind": "role",
      "role": "generator"
    },
    "dependsOn": []
  }
}
```
[User] You are the planner actor for a deterministic Pluto runtime phase.
Return exactly one fenced ```json block and nothing else.
The directive kind must be `create_task` and the payload must match exactly.
```json
{
  "kind": "create_task",
  "payload": {
    "title": "Implement the requested runtime change",
    "ownerActor": {
      "kind": "role",
      "role": "generator"
    },
    "dependsOn": []
  }
}
```
```json
{
  "kind": "create_task",
  "payload": {
    "title": "Implement the requested runtime change",
    "ownerActor": {
      "kind": "role",
      "role": "generator"
    },
    "dependsOn": []
  }
}
```
